name: DoubleVerify Holdings, Inc.
description: DoubleVerify Holdings, Inc. provides a software platform for digital media measurement and analytics in the United States and internationally. The company's platform provides unbiased double-verification solutions that protect digital brand investments and increase ad quality and performance. It offers solutions to advertisers, programmatic platforms, social media networks, and digital publishers to ensure that digital ad impressions are viewable, fraud-free, and appear in brand-safe environments.
